questions.question: Explain the difference between signature-based and anomaly-based detection in network traffic analysis.
expectedPoints: Signature-based uses predefined patterns of known threats
Anomaly-based establishes baseline of normal behavior and flags deviations
Signature is better for known attacks, anomaly for novel threats
Both approaches are often used together for comprehensive protection

questions.question: Describe the privacy considerations and best practices for implementing network traffic analysis in an organization.
expectedPoints: Data minimization - collect only necessary information
Clear retention policies with defined time limits
Compliance with regulations like GDPR, HIPAA
Access controls to restrict sensitive traffic data
Employee awareness and transparency about monitoring
Regular auditing of access to monitoring systems
